name: Example 1
content: Jamie has had a wonderful term in Grade 3A. She approaches every subject with enthusiasm and curiosity, and her love of learning is truly evident in her daily work. In mathematics, Jamie demonstrates a solid understanding of place value and tackles new concepts with confidence. Her reading has grown tremendously — she reads with expression and comprehension beyond grade level. Jamie's writing reflects her creative spirit; her narratives are vivid and well-structured. She is a thoughtful classroom citizen who supports her peers and contributes meaningfully to group discussions. We look forward to watching her continue to flourish.

name: Example 2
content: Daniel is a hardworking and motivated learner who consistently gives his best effort. This term he has made impressive strides in literacy, moving from short sentences to detailed paragraphs that show real voice and personality. In numeracy Daniel has mastered addition and subtraction facts and is beginning to apply these skills in problem-solving contexts. He listens attentively in class and asks perceptive questions that deepen his own understanding and spark discussion. We have been delighted by Daniel's growth this term.
